captain_rankings.name: Haaland
captain_rankings.notes: Gemini C anchor (captain_xpts=14). Top floor+ceiling, dominant brace odds. Watch rotation risk.

captain_rankings.name: Saka
captain_rankings.notes: Elite ceiling differential - goal+assist threat for ARS; highest variance alternative.

captain_rankings.name: B.Fernandes
captain_rankings.notes: Pens + creativity give a stable floor; lower brace odds than the forwards.

captain_rankings.name: Bowen
captain_rankings.notes: Current squad armband. Reliable minutes, decent return rate, capped ceiling vs Haaland.

captain_rankings.name: Thiago
captain_rankings.notes: Penalty-box poacher - good goal lambda but thin assist/bonus floor.
